config.seed_text: In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: The blue star looked up from its orbit on some distant horizon at just over half an hour ahead which we ignored because they didn't care what time you gave them (they do know). Our plan for this day will involve two very different scenarios; either our new theory can explain every possible outcome within seconds or there's something weird going on with all those trees that seem to suggest maybe things only happens when people come back later than usual? Either way I think my best chance would be now but since none out yet here seems like one good idea so far…

TEXT:
In the observatory ruins, a clockwork map kept redrawing the sky as if tomorrow had already happened and was trying to warn us. The blue star looked up from its orbit on some distant horizon at just over half an hour ahead which we ignored because they didn't care what time you gave them (they do know). Our plan for this day will involve two very different scenarios; either our new theory can explain every possible outcome within seconds or there's something weird going on with all those trees that seem to suggest maybe things only happens when people come back later than usual? Either way I think my best chance would be now but since none out yet here seems like one good idea so far…
